title: Dalis Creek Episode 1 Opening
philosophyNote: Small acts of kindness reshape the emotional climate of a place.
narrativeChecks: The creek should feel alive before dialogue begins.
Dali and Dori must read as friends before the first line lands.
The opening beat should already feel reusable for both long-form and later short extraction.
characterDescription: Dali, Dori, and a child-friendly forest world with rounded silhouettes
location: sunlit creek path in early spring

beats.summary: The creek opens in quiet motion before the characters enter.
beats.visualIntent: Use drifting water, leaves, and warm morning light to establish tone.
beats.location: sunlit creek path in early spring

beats.summary: Dori arrives first and waits with a patient smile.
beats.dialogue: Dali is late again, but the creek is worth waiting for.
beats.visualIntent: Shift from environment to character warmth without losing the creek.
beats.location: sunlit creek path in early spring

beats.summary: Dali rushes in with bright energy and turns the waiting into reunion.
beats.dialogue: I found the herbs. Come on, the morning is too pretty to waste.
beats.visualIntent: The reunion should feel like motion entering a peaceful frame, not breaking it.
beats.location: sunlit creek path in early spring
